description_long: This object is a classic Sony Ericsson Walkman mobile phone, featuring a predominantly black front with a large rectangular screen and a circular orange navigation pad below it. The keypad is arranged in a standard alphanumeric layout, with additional orange Walkman branding and music control buttons. The back of the phone is a vibrant orange color, displaying the Sony Ericsson logo, a camera lens with two adjacent flash modules, and a speaker grille. The sides of the phone are slim, with visible buttons and a connector port, and the overall build appears to be a combination of plastic and metal. The phone's design is compact and ergonomic, typical of early 2000s feature phones, and it is likely lightweight and easily portable. The surface finish is smooth and slightly glossy, with tactile buttons and a hard exterior shell.
description: A compact Sony Ericsson Walkman mobile phone with a black front, orange back, and prominent camera and branding details. Features a large screen, tactile keypad, and music control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black face with a large screen, circular orange navigation pad, alphanumeric keypad, and Walkman branding.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the slim orange edge and the phone's overall thin profile, with minimal visible buttons.
description_view_2: Back view displays the orange casing, camera lens with two flashes, speaker grille, and Sony Ericsson branding.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the orange edge, a visible button, and a connector port near the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: The Sony Ericsson logo is present on the back, vertically aligned near the right edge, and the Walkman logo appears in orange on both the front bottom bezel and the back lower center.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears blank or turned off, with no visible content, icons, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located on the upper left of the back, accompanied by two circular flash modules to its left.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons include a circular navigation pad and keypad on the front, with additional side buttons visible on the right edge and a possible camera button.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: None; the phone's exterior is its original plastic and metal casing with no additional case or cover.
